tabs.closeConfirmDescription: Closing will lock this space. You'll need to re-enter its password when you open it again (if one is set).

picker.label: Spaces
picker.emptyHint: Create a space to start organizing your worlds.

gate.title: Space locked
gate.subtitle: Enter the password to unlock "{{name}}".
gate.hint: This space is password-protected. Only authorized users can access it.

home.title: Space
home.subtitle: Manage the worlds in this space and start creating.

emptyWorlds.title: No worlds in this space yet
emptyWorlds.description: Create the first world in this space to start building characters, weaving events, and writing novels.

landing.title: Spaces
landing.subtitle: Pick a space to continue, or organize your worlds into spaces.

create.title: New space
create.description: Create a new space to group and organize your worlds.
create.passwordHint: Optional. When set, opening this space requires the password.
create.setPassword: Protect this space with a password

edit.title: Edit space
edit.description: Update the name of this space.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.description: This cannot be undone. All worlds in this space, along with their characters, locations, items, lore, events, and novel data, will be permanently deleted.
delete.worldsCount: This space contains {{count}} world(s), which will also be deleted.
delete.confirm: I confirm I want to delete this space and all of its contents
delete.passwordRequired: This space is password-protected. Enter the password to confirm deletion.

password.removeConfirm: Removing the password will leave this space unprotected.

errors.passwordRequired: This action requires the space password
